# Attack Potion

## Description

Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Strong Act 1 elite/boss potion because it adds immediate free damage; save by default unless a scaling hallway threatens severe HP loss or lethal.
- In boss/elite burst windows, choose from the live card text and current modifiers; generated multi-card attacks like Fiend Fire can underperform theoretical hand-size math.
